generated_oml:
instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system operation"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe actuation control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for room temperature measurement with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement (position 1)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemp1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement (position 2)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemp2DataTransmitted
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring power supply voltage in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerSupplyVoltageDataTransmitted
]

instance PowerSupplyCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring power supply current in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerSupplyCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemp1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1
]

instance InternalTemp2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor2
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplyVoltageSensor
]

instance PowerSupplyCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplyCurrentSensor
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from room temperature sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance InternalTemp1Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal sensor position 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemp1DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance InternalTemp2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal sensor position 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemp2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time voltage data from power supply"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerSupplyVoltageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance PowerSupplyCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time current data from power supply"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerSupplyCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system for regulating internal temperature"
    base:contains Container, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply, RoomTemperatureSensor, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, PowerSupplyVoltageSensor, PowerSupplyCurrentSensor
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and virtual model"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SimulationPredictionService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy non-linear least squares solver for model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of models and specifications"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) relaxing heatbed heat accumulation assumption"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for model parameter optimization using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationUpdates
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance of thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection in thermal incubator system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for thermal incubator internal states"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance SimulationPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of thermal behavior for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationPredictionInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature violations in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing control parameters to improve thermal efficiency"
]

instance ModelCalibrationUpdates : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updates to model parameters based on calibration algorithms"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of faults in system components"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal states of the thermal system"
]

instance SimulationPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior under various operational scenarios"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPower : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power level based on optimization insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed based on temperature monitoring insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TriggerAlarm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger alarm upon temperature violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs handling 4A current for thermal regulation"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V/24V for airflow control in the thermal incubator"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into hardware actuation signals through MOSFETs and optocouplers on the PCB to regulate heatbed and fan operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Components include RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and thermal models. Data flows via RabbitMQ between PT sensors/actuators and DT components, with controller processing sensor data and issuing actuation commands."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates models for the 'as operated' phase of the physical incubator system, as stated: 'once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin' to monitor and predict current operating conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as better for predicting thermal inertia of heatbed. Temperature uniformity tested via sensor discrepancies (max 7°C with 12V fan, reduced to 6°C with 18V fan). Calibration minimizes residual error using non-linear least squares optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for communication between PT and DT components. All components (sensors, controller, RabbitMQ) operate on the same Raspberry Pi over local network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all DT components (controller, low-level driver, models) are deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with communication via local RabbitMQ instance."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to ensure device safety during actuation. No explicit cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, access control) are detailed in the document."
]
